metadata.command: pip install astropy --upgrade --timeout 120 && python -c "from astropy.modeling import models as m; from astropy.modeling.separable import separability_matrix; print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))); print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & (m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))))"

pip install astropy --upgrade && python -c "from astropy.modeling import models as m; from astropy.modeling.separable import separability_matrix; print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))); print(separability_matrix(m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & (m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5))))"
